commands.review_summary:
The branch excludes Codex-native `webSearch` items from mirrored transcript tool-call/tool-result snapshots while preserving native tool progress, adds a projector regression test, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main sends completed `webSearch` items through native transcript call/result recorders and synthesizes a status-only result. I did not execute a live current-main Codex web-search run in this read-only review.
